acquisition method: We performed SRM-MS analysis in concentrated cultured media to detect the ubiquitination of released tau.
cleavage agent: we performed a proximity ligation assay (PLA) using T22 antibody, which specifically recognizes tau oligomers and FK2 antibody, which recognizes ubiquitinated proteins.
fragmentation method: the MS/MS spectra of ubiquitinated tau-K385 and tau-395 are shown in Figure 2, A and B, respectively.
instrument: the Easy nLC1000 UHPLC-Q Exactive Orbitrap LC-MS system.
